name: Library Fetcher
description: Search a configured library website, download the target book, and reuse a local cache when available.

playbooksDir.label: Playbooks Dir
playbooksDir.help: Directory containing one playbook JSON per supported library site.

defaultSiteId.label: Default Site ID
defaultSiteId.help: Default site playbook id. The plugin will load <playbooksDir>/<siteId>.json.

defaultPlaybookPath.label: Default Playbook Path
defaultPlaybookPath.help: Optional explicit playbook path if you only maintain one site.

defaultLibraryRoot.label: Library Root
defaultLibraryRoot.help: Local cache directory where downloaded books are stored.

browserProfilePath.label: Browser Profile Path
browserProfilePath.help: Optional persistent browser profile to preserve login state for the library site.

agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.label: Session Config Path
agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.help: Optional JSON file containing sessionName/profilePath overrides for the persistent agent-browser session.

llmFallbackCommand.label: LLM Repair Command
llmFallbackCommand.help: Optional external command that receives step failure context as JSON on stdin and returns repair instructions as JSON.

playbooksDir.description: Directory containing one playbook JSON per supported site.

defaultSiteId.description: Default site id resolved against playbooksDir.

browserProfilePath.description: Optional browser profile path used for authenticated sessions.

agentBrowserSessionConfigPath.description: Optional JSON file used to resolve the persistent agent-browser session and profile.

agentBrowserPath.description: Optional absolute path to the agent-browser executable.

llmFallbackCommand.description: Optional external command used for LLM-based playbook repair.

llmFallbackArgs.description: Optional arguments passed to the LLM repair command.
